zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Anne Stafford於1465年出生在英國武斯特斯爾葛拉芙頓 福利福德時，她的父親Sir Humphrey Stafford38歲，母親Katherine Fray28歲。她於大約1490年與Sir Richard Neville結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1544年3月15日在英國巴金哈姆爾斯托克 波格斯享年79歲，埋葬在英國越可爾維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Anne Stafford于1465年出生在英国武斯特斯爾葛拉芙頓 福利福德时，她的父亲Sir Humphrey Stafford38岁，母亲Katherine Fray28岁。她于大约1490年与Sir Richard Neville结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1544年3月15日在英国巴金哈姆爾斯托克 波格斯享年79岁，埋葬在英国越可爾維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Stafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Stafford (Staffordshire), but occasionally from other places with similar names, such as Stafford House in Ifield (Sussex), possibly East and West Stowford in East Down (Devon), and three minor places in Devon called Stafford, in Dolton, Broadhembury, and Colyton parishes. The places are all named with Old English ford ‘ford’ as the final element, but have different initial elements. The Staffordshire placename has Old English stæth ‘river bank, shore’; Stafford in Colyton (Devon) has Old English stān ‘stone, rock’; the Sussex placename has Old English stēor ‘steer, bullock’; East and West Stowford (Devon) have Old English stæf ‘staff, stave, rod’; Stafford in Dolton and Stafford in Broadhembury (Devon) may have Old English stæth, stān, or stæf.

variants.name: Stocker
meanings: German and Swiss German (also Stöcker): topographic name for someone living by a tree stump (see Stock 3) or an occupational name for a tree cutter, from Middle High German stocken ‘to clear land’.
German and Swiss German (also Stöcker); Dutch: occupational name from Middle High German, Middle Dutch stocker ‘jailer’.

English: occupational name from Middle English stokker ‘one who sells stockfish’ (fish dried in the air without salt). This was the usual source of the name in medieval London, where a bylaw of 1419 stated that no stokker should board a ship to buy fish (presumably in order to forestall the market).

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Anne Stafford was born in 1465, in Grafton Flyford, Worcestershire, England, her father, Sir Humphrey Stafford, was 38 and her mother, Katherine Fray, was 28. She married Sir Richard Neville about 1490. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 15 March 1544, in Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 79, and was buried in Well, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Anne Stafford est née en 1465, à Grafton Flyford, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Humphrey Stafford, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Katherine Fray, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Neville environ 1490. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 mars 1544, à Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à Well, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Anne Stafford 1465 in Grafton Flyford, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Humphrey Stafford 38 und ihre Mutter Katherine Fray 28. Sie hat um 1490 Sir Richard Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. März 1544 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England und wurde in Well, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne Stafford è nata il nel 1465 nel Grafton Flyford, Worcestershire, England, sua padre, Sir Humphrey Stafford, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Katherine Fray, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Neville circa 1490. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 15 marzo 1544, nel Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolta a Well, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Staffordが1465年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアグラフトン フリフォードで生まれた時，父Sir Humphrey Staffordは38歳，母Katherine Frayは28歳であった。約1490年にSir Richard Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1544年3月15日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアストク ポジェズで79歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Stafford(이)가 1465년 영국 워스스터실르 그라프턴 플리퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Humphrey Stafford(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Fray(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1490년 Sir Richard Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1544년 3월 15일 영국 벅잉함실르 스토크 포그스에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 웰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne Stafford nasceu em 1465, em Grafton Flyford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Humphrey Stafford, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Fray, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Neville aproximadamente 1490. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de março de 1544, em Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 79 anos, e foi sepultada em Well, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Anne Stafford родилась в 1465 г. в местности графтон флифорд, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Humphrey Stafford было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Fray, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Neville около 1490 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 15 марта 1544 г. в местности сток погесь, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности велл, еркшир, Англия.
